name: nda_lifecycle
description: an NDA lifecycle world with expiry and renewal; actions execute, amend, expire

card.description: an NDA lifecycle world with expiry and renewal; actions execute, amend, expire

rules: An NDA begins as a 'draft' and only an executed NDA is in force.
'execute' on a draft makes it 'active' and sets expires_on = day + term_days.
'execute' on an 'expired' NDA renews it: a fresh term begins on the current day, incrementing renewals and version.
'execute' on an already 'active' NDA has no effect (idempotent).
'amend' is only valid while 'active'; it increments amendments and version, and extends expires_on (and term_days) by params.extend_days when provided.
'expire' lapses an 'active' NDA: the clock advances to expires_on and status becomes 'expired'; on a draft or already-expired NDA it has no effect.
expires_on and executed_on are null while the NDA is a draft.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name")
    params = action.get("params") or {}
    status = s.get("status", "draft")
    day = int(s.get("day", 0))
    term = int(s.get("term_days", 365))

    if name == "execute":
        # Bring a draft into force, or renew a lapsed agreement from today.
        if status == "draft":
            s["status"] = "active"
            s["executed_on"] = day
            s["expires_on"] = day + term
        elif status == "expired":
            # Renewal: a fresh term begins on the day the old one lapsed.
            s["status"] = "active"
            s["executed_on"] = day
            s["expires_on"] = day + term
            s["renewals"] = int(s.get("renewals", 0)) + 1
            s["version"] = int(s.get("version", 1)) + 1
        # Executing an already in-force NDA is a no-op (idempotent).

    elif name == "amend":
        # Amend the terms of an in-force NDA: bump the version and, optionally,
        # extend the confidentiality term by `extend_days`.
        if status == "active":
            extend = int(params.get("extend_days", 0))
            if extend < 0:
                extend = 0
            s["amendments"] = int(s.get("amendments", 0)) + 1
            s["version"] = int(s.get("version", 1)) + 1
            if extend > 0:
                s["expires_on"] = int(s.get("expires_on", day)) + extend
                s["term_days"] = term + extend

    elif name == "expire":
        # Advance the clock to the expiry date and lapse the NDA. Only an
        # in-force NDA can expire; on a draft or already-lapsed NDA it is a
        # no-op.
        if status == "active":
            expires_on = int(s.get("expires_on", day))
            if day < expires_on:
                day = expires_on
            s["day"] = day
            s["status"] = "expired"
            s["lapses"] = int(s.get("lapses", 0)) + 1

    return s

emit.report: NDA v{version}: {status} (day {day}); expires on {expires_on}; {renewals} renewal(s), {lapses} lapse(s).
